title: dasyglossum ferrugineum
intro: Dasyglossum ferrugineum, also known as the rusty club moss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular, and spore-producing plant that belongs to the group Lycopodiophyta. The medicinal properties of Dasyglossum ferrugineum are primarily derived from its spores, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Dasyglossum ferrugineum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal medicine, often in combination with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
